scenarios.description: dataset() on new Element with no attributes returns empty map (attributes==null branch, zero data-* attrs)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // attributes is null initially
pseudocode: TEST TC01 dataset empty when no attributes

scenarios.description: dataset() after setting non-data attribute returns empty map (attributes!=null branch, zero data-* attrs)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("span"); el.attr("foo","bar"); // only non-data attribute
pseudocode: TEST TC02 dataset excludes non-data attrs

scenarios.description: dataset() includes single data-* attribute (loop-1 iteration)

scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.attr("data-a","1"); el.attr("data-b","2"); el.attr("data-c","3");
scenarios.expectedResult: returned map contains exactly keys ["a","b","c"] with corresponding values ["1","2","3"]
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); el.attr("data-a","1"); el.attr("data-b","2"); el.attr("data-c","3");

scenarios.description: dataset() returns view that reflects adding via map.put propagates to element attributes
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // attributes!=null after call; Map<String,String> ds = el.dataset();
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Map<String,String> ds = el.dataset();
